rationale: No conflict. The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §22.006 addresses jury-service protections for school district employees and is wholly unrelated to property tax exemptions.
quote: A school district may not discharge, discipline, reduce the salary of, or otherwise penalize or discriminate against a school district employee because of the employee's compliance with a summons to appear as a juror.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no textual or substantive overlap exists.
